personaforge.tagline: Extract your cognitive patterns into a structured persona. See how you think before you delegate.
personaforge.description: PersonaForge turns implicit thinking habits into explicit, inspectable declarations. It's a self-reflection tool built on JDVP's measurement framework.

status.label: Status
status.note: v0.4 whitepaper published. Extraction pipeline functional.

items.toy: A toy that externalizes your way of thinking into a cognitive declaration
items.reflection: A self-reflection tool, not a profiling product
items.declaration: Persona = Cognitive Declaration, not personality measurement

items.psychology: Not a precision psychology analysis tool
items.alignment: Not an AI alignment control system

pipeline.title: Toy Pipeline
pipeline.description: Four steps from conversation to versioned cognitive artifact.

extract.title: Extract
extract.description: Conversation-based extraction. An LLM drafts your cognitive declaration from dialogue history.

calibrate.title: Calibrate
calibrate.description: Structured question layer. MBTI-style cognitive preference and judgment-threshold prompts refine the draft.

deepen.title: Deepen
deepen.description: LLM interactive deepening. Adaptive follow-ups on contradiction points, delegation thresholds, risk boundaries.

freeze.title: Freeze
freeze.description: Lock final declaration into versioned artifacts: declaration.md, agent_system_prompt.txt, metadata.json.

output.title: Output Structure
output.description: Each persona version produces three artifacts.

declaration.title: declaration.md
declaration.description: Identity, judgment principles, delegation policy, risk boundaries, update triggers.

prompt.title: agent_system_prompt.txt
prompt.description: Reasoning policy for AI agents. Capability belongs to model, policy belongs to persona.

metadata.title: metadata.json
metadata.description: Version, source method, confidence scores, optional JDVP extensions.

connection.title: Connection to BufferLine
connection.description: JDVP measures where judgment moves. PersonaForge captures how you judge. Together, they make delegation patterns visible and governable.
connection.future: Future: JDVP telemetry feeds into persona drift tracking
